title: Cuneiform Tablet #0174: Middle Assyrian Adoption
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Adoption document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records adoption matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
